---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new model, metric, scenario, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Link to any related issues or research.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you want. Include pseudocode, formulas, or
references where helpful.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh? Why is this one better?

## Impact

- Affected modules: [e.g. `src/rdd/`, `src/milp/`, `src/evaluation/`]
- Test coverage: [what tests would you add?]
- Documentation: [what docs would need updating?]

## Additional context

References, screenshots, or any other context.
